e8a8a511-9271-4f5f-aead-f86f524189a0.title: App
e8a8a511-9271-4f5f-aead-f86f524189a0.body: Entry point. Routes between DocumentPicker and CanvasView.

029c9eac-139d-4ab5-876d-d5b3b0a5635a.title: DocumentPicker
029c9eac-139d-4ab5-876d-d5b3b0a5635a.body: Lists available .canvas.json files. Calls onSelect(path) to open.

7ae9fc25-4802-4db3-9cec-1ab86e537f46.title: CanvasView
7ae9fc25-4802-4db3-9cec-1ab86e537f46.body: Outer canvas wrapper. Owns document state (store), WebSocket watch, live position/size tracking. Renders Canvas + toolbar.

32c6e09f-d58e-4cce-a55e-4989c829c415.title: CanvasContent
32c6e09f-d58e-4cce-a55e-4989c829c415.body: Inner component inside <Canvas> provider. Owns drag/resize callbacks, delete handler, extract-to-note. Renders notes and edges.

e56aef71-ca4b-41f8-888f-827da379b2cf.title: Canvas (cactus)
e56aef71-ca4b-41f8-888f-827da379b2cf.body: Engine component from @luminous/cactus. Provides context: transform, selection, connection drag, box-select. Wraps d3-zoom.

c3bbb39d-08c5-4b68-af76-79d20521fb15.title: CanvasToolbar
c3bbb39d-08c5-4b68-af76-79d20521fb15.body: Floating toolbar. Zoom in/out, fit view, untangle (layout).

b3a274b5-2090-4c4d-bb11-acb1c30bbd23.title: NoteNode
b3a274b5-2090-4c4d-bb11-acb1c30bbd23.body: Individual note on the canvas. Title input, MarkdownEditor, context menu. Will use NodeShell from cactus after extraction refactor.

740dbd9a-05a4-47cd-99bf-7a489415831a.title: FreeformEdge
740dbd9a-05a4-47cd-99bf-7a489415831a.body: SVG line between two notes. Resolves absolute positions from note hierarchy. Double-click to edit label.

5442c5c5-95ee-416f-ad6c-c67435681c5c.title: MarkdownEditor
5442c5c5-95ee-416f-ad6c-c67435681c5c.body: CodeMirror 6 editor with markdown syntax. Handles onChange, text selection for extract-to-note.

66f4983c-8921-4d03-b385-0e395931db7b.title: ContextMenu
66f4983c-8921-4d03-b385-0e395931db7b.body: Right-click menu. Renders menu items with actions. Closes on outside click.

e1647a6d-57c1-409b-88d8-d166a5f5a6ed.title: ConnectionHandle (cactus)
e1647a6d-57c1-409b-88d8-d166a5f5a6ed.body: Draggable source handle on node edge. Initiates connection drag via onStartConnection.

cbfd6d68-3e45-4851-967d-f1206727bd09.title: DotGrid (cactus)
cbfd6d68-3e45-4851-967d-f1206727bd09.body: SVG background pattern. Renders dot grid that pans/zooms with canvas.
